plan.title: Add continuation precedence and deficit-biased selection to the queue

narratives.Description: Implements continuation precedence and deficit-biased selection in the queue and cohort-fill so a started epic's remaining stories outrank net-new work and under-target capacity buckets get preferentially promoted. This realizes the RFC lexicographic selection sort on top of the rank field from Slice 1 and the bucket tallies from the capacity engine.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Extend the ranking comparator in scripts/triage_queue.py and the cohort-fill path in scripts/swarm_launch.py to apply the order urgent, continuation, bucket-deficit, rank, date, reading bucket tallies from the capacity module. 2. Add tests in tests/cli/test_triage_queue.py that assert continuation work and deficit buckets sort ahead of net-new work, including a finishBeforeStart variant.
narratives.UserStory: As a swarm operator, I want started epics and under-target buckets selected first, so that work finishes before new work starts.

items.title: Given an epic with one completed child, when cohort-fill runs, then its remaining stories rank ahead of net-new scopes.

narrative.Acceptance: Given an epic with one completed child, when cohort-fill runs, then its remaining stories rank ahead of net-new scopes.

items.title: When two net-new scopes differ in bucket deficit, then the queue selects the most under-target bucket first.

narrative.Acceptance: When two net-new scopes differ in bucket deficit, then the queue selects the most under-target bucket first.

items.title: Given finishBeforeStart is true and wipCap is reached, when promotion runs, then the queue blocks net-new scopes and allows only continuation work.

narrative.Acceptance: Given finishBeforeStart is true and wipCap is reached, when promotion runs, then the queue blocks net-new scopes and allows only continuation work.

expected_outputs: tests cover continuation, deficit, and finishBeforeStart paths

references.title: Issue #1419: RFC: Agentic Prioritization & Coordination Model for Deft Directive
